name: Weakened Constitution
entries: Your connection to the Fey Courts has granted you tremendous power but also an inherent fragility. When you become {@condition Bloodied|XPHB} for the first time after you roll {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB}, you must succeed on a DC 20 Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, you gain a level of {@condition Exhaustion|XPHB}.

As a {@action Magic|XPHB} action, you can expend a number of {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB} equal to your Transformation Stage to remove one level of {@condition Exhaustion|XPHB} gained in this manner. You gain no other benefit from those expended {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB}.
